posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We’d love to have the ability to reorder the Item Name column on a Monday board, just like any other column. Currently, it’s locked as the first column, but in many cases, it would be helpful to move it to better fit specific workflows or visual preferences. Giving users more flexibility to organize their boards would really improve usability. Thanks!

What are you trying to achieve

Re order the item name column. REALLY IMPORTANT
